title: 5 blockchain stocks to invest in April 2023
text: Blockchain technology that underpins Bitcoin (BTC) and other cryptocurrencies may have far-reaching uses outside the cryptocurrency industry.

title: 5 Very Well-Known ‘Strong Buy' Stocks Trading Under $10 With Huge Upside Potential
text: While most of Wall Street focuses on large-cap and mega-cap stocks, as they provide a degree of safety and liquidity, many investors are limited in the number of shares they can buy.

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Robinhood Markets, Inc. – HOOD
text: NEW YORK, March 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — Pomerantz LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: HOOD). Such investors are advised to contact Robert S. Willoughby at newaction@pomlaw.com or 888-476-6529, ext. 7980. The investigation concerns whether Robinhood and certain of its officers and/or directors have engaged in […]...

title: 5 Former Sizzling IPOs That Are Buy-Rated and Trading Under $10
text: While most of Wall Street focuses on large-cap and mega-cap stocks, as they provide a degree of safety and liquidity, many investors are limited in the number of shares they can buy.

title: Robinhood Makes a U-Turn, Will Honor Bets Against Signature Bank
text: Robinhood has backed down on its decision to let its customers' profitable put options contracts against the collapsed Signature Bank expire without a payout.

title: Robinhood Bends To Pressure And Permits Short Selling To Replace Put Options On Signature Bank
text: Retail traders, backed by an important short-seller, expressed enough anger that the mobile app was forced to come up with a solution.

title: Robinhood COO Gretchen Howard to retire
text: Robinhood Markets Inc. HOOD said in a filing late Wednesday that Chief Operating Officer Gretchen Howard will retire from the company at the end of the year. Howard will transition to an advisory role on April 3 “to support certain special projects for the CEO.

title: Robinhood COO Howard to retire at year-end
text: Online brokerage Robinhood Markets Inc said on Wednesday its Chief Operating Officer Gretchen Howard will retire at the end of 2023.

title: Do Robinhood traders face wipeout on risky Signature Bank bets?
text: Retail trading platform Robinhood is back in the firing line for failing to honour trades, this time in relation to options placed on collapsed US lender Signature Bank. Accusations being shared over Twitter suggest Robinhood is not allowing traders to cash in their profitable puts against the bank, which folded last week amid an ongoing crisis in the banking sector.

title: Robinhood Users Say The Trading App Won't Cash In Their Profitable Bets Against Silicon Valley Bank
text: They wagered correctly that the bank and others would collapse. Now they're blowing up social media with complaints that they aren't getting their money.

title: Robinhood sees higher stock trading, accounts and margin balances in February, but active users stay flat
text: Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc. HOOD on Monday said user accounts ticked higher month-over-month in February, but said other metrics remained the same over that time. Net cumulative funded accounts — or accounts into which users put money or other assets — rose by around 50,000 to 23.1 million.

title: Better Robinhood Stock: Microsoft vs. Disney
text: Microsoft and Disney are both widely held on Robinhood. Microsoft faces a cyclical slowdown this year as enterprise spending on its software and cloud-based services cools off.

title: Robinhood: Green Shoots Are Here
text: Shares of Robinhood have tumbled since reporting fourth-quarter results, in line with volatility in the tech sector. Though Robinhood continues to struggle from lower cryptocurrency-based revenue, it has seen surging net interest revenue to offset it, driven by higher rates.

title: ARK Buys the Dip, Adding $13.4M in Coinbase and Robinhood Shares
text: ARK Invest injected a total of $13.4 million into Coinbase and Robinhood stocks this week, a new emailed trade notification showed.

title: Cathie Wood Adds $12M Of Tesla Stock, Raises Robinhood Stake
text: Cathie Wood-led ARK Investment Management bought 69,329 shares of Tesla Inc TSLA on Wednesday at an estimated valuation of over $12.6 million based on Wednesday's closing price.

title: 3 Stocks That Went Public In 2021 May Be In Buy Range Soon
text: Newly public companies are often among the market's biggest percentage gainers, and 2021 initial public offerings Globalfoundries Inc. (NASDAQ: GFS), On Holding AG (NYSE: ONON), and Qualtrics International Inc. (NASDAQ: XM) may be setting up for a fresh round of price gains.

title: Robinhood's wallet app is now available to all iOS users
text: Robinhood announced Wednesday that its self-custodial crypto wallet app is now for all users on iOS. The wallet first debuted last September in beta with 10,000 users and no network charges for swapping Polygon's MATIC tokens.

title: Robinhood Wallet Is Now Open to All iOS Users
text: Crypto and stock broker Robinhood launched Robinhood Wallet to all global iOS users, with no waitlist or invitation code required to use it anymore.

title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. to Present at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 8, 2023
text: MENLO PARK, Calif., March 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) announced that it will be participating in the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 8, 2023.

title: Is Robinhood a Turnaround?
text: Robinhood Markets Inc. ( HOOD , Financial) is one of the most popular stock brokerage platforms in the U.S, having pioneered the concept of “free trading.” The company's platform experienced a major surge in popularity during the Covid-19 lockdown of 2020, as many stimulus check-fueled consumers took to the app to invest in stocks.
